We need to evaluate the text. The questions:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text includes introduction, maybe some subsections, but main sections? Not explicitly listing chapters. There's no table of contents. The text contains a tabular plan of tasks but not main chapters. So likely no.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? The text includes various paragraphs describing context, but not sections. So no.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? Not well. So no.

Provide JSON array with three objects.

Each object has "question": "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback.

Also "complies" boolean false for all.
